name: Nutty Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp (to 1/2 tsp) crushed Dried hot red peppers
3 cups Cooked long-grain White rice, heated
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Stir in the dried red peppers according to taste and the macadamia nuts.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until the nuts begin to turn golden, 3-4 minutes.
4. Reduce the heat and lightly toss in the cooked rice.
5. Serve immediately or keep warm in a 225°F oven.
